charts.title: Rides per Day
charts.bq: SELECT DATE(created_at) d, COUNT(*) c FROM `ride_sharing.ride_requests` GROUP BY d

charts.title: Payouts per Day
charts.bq: SELECT DATE(createdAt) d, SUM(amountUsd) FROM `payouts` GROUP BY d

instructions: Import this file into Looker Studio and bind the data sources to your project.
